HomeAI PlannerBookingsProfile

OurStory

Born in the Himalayas, built for the curious traveler. KuboVista is redefining how India discovers its own mountains.

OurMission

To make the hidden corners of the Himalayas accessible, sustainable, and unforgettable — one traveler at a time.

We believe the best travel stories are found where the roads end. Our mission is to connect conscious travelers with offbeat destinations while preserving their natural and cultural heritage.

WhyKuboVista?

Four pillars that define everything we do.

Local Expertise

Our team lives and breathes the Himalayas. Every recommendation comes from first-hand experience and deep local relationships.

Authentic Experiences

We go beyond sightseeing. Stay in village homes, share meals with families, and participate in age-old traditions.

Sustainable Tourism

We are committed to low-impact travel. Our partnerships fund conservation and empower communities directly.

Verified Stays

Every homestay and hotel is personally inspected. Clean, safe, and genuinely welcoming — guaranteed.

0+Destinations
0+Happy Travelers

0+Curated Packages

MeettheTeam

The people behind your Himalayan adventures.

Tenzing Norbu

Founder & CEO

Born in the hills of Sikkim, Tenzing turned his passion for exploration into a mission to reveal hidden destinations.

Ankita Sharma

Head of Experiences

Ankita designs immersive itineraries that connect travelers with the soul of each destination.

Rahul Basnet

Operations Lead

Rahul ensures every trip runs like clockwork, from transport to the smallest homestay detail.

Priya Limbu

Community Manager

Priya bridges the gap between travelers and hosts, building a network of trusted local partners.

OurValues

Principles that guide every decision we make.

Respect for Culture

We honor the traditions of the communities we visit and educate travelers to do the same.

Transparency

No hidden fees, no surprise costs. What you see is what you pay — and where your money goes.

Safety First

From verified hosts to emergency protocols, your well-being is our highest priority.

Community First

A significant portion of every booking directly supports local families and conservation.
